summary: Sarma Melngailis discusses her experiences as the subject of the Netflix documentary 'Bad Vegan,' her restaurant Pure Food and Wine, and her relationship with Anthony Strangis. She reflects on the events that led to her arrest and imprisonment, and shares her perspective on the documentary's portrayal of her story.

main_entities.context: Chef and restaurateur, subject of the documentary 'Bad Vegan'

main_entities.name: Anthony Strangis
main_entities.context: Sarma's ex-husband, also known as Shane Fox, involved in the events leading to her legal troubles

main_entities.name: A Room with a View
main_entities.context: Sarma's third favorite film, a contrast to the violence of True Romance

key_details.fact: Sarma disputes the veracity of the 'Bad Vegan' documentary and its conclusions, saying that she was misrepresented.
Sarma pleaded guilty to stealing over two million dollars and served four months at Rikers Island jail.
Sarma and Anthony Strangis met on Twitter and communicated through Words with Friends and Gchat.
Anthony Strangis claimed to be a Navy SEAL and implied involvement with the CIA.
Sarma recorded a phone call with Anthony Strangis after her release from prison, which was used in the documentary.
Sarma believes Anthony's primary goal was to destroy her and burn all her bridges.
Sarma's dog, Leon, has his own Instagram account.
Sarma was heartbroken from a previous relationship with Tobin, who was 15 years younger than her, when she met Anthony.
